fetchMethod: OpenClaw managed browser, Google Maps place panel, Reviews tab, Sort -> Highest rating; scrolled all-highest list and then used Google review topic chips while Highest remained selected to collect additional written five-star snippets after Maps stopped paginating the all-highest list.
coverage: 30 written five-star Google review rows/snippets captured from live DOM. The first 20 are from All reviews + Highest rating; rows 21-30 are unique five-star rows exposed via topic chips with Highest rating still selected because the all-highest panel stopped paginating at 20 rows and surfaced a server error.
limitations: Some Google Maps rows remain snippet-truncated with ellipses even after See more expansion; marked bodyTruncated=true.
The browser screenshot artifact is available from the OpenClaw browser run, while local Chrome screenshots cover the preview itself.

reviews.author: Stephanie Martinez
reviews.body: Had a wonderful early dinner for my birthday. We ordered dumplings- pork and shrimp- both were great. Could really taste the shrimp in the steamed dumplings and the fried pork dumplings did not disappoint. We ordered some Pho as well as a …

reviews.author: Terrel Williamson
reviews.body: Nothing short of perfection. Service is A1, food was spectacular and the atmosphere was energetic. Waitress is knowledgeable about the entire menu and recommendations were spot on. I definitely will be back as long as they will have me. Natalie was amazing. She took time to educate and gave her honest opinions. She deserves a raise!!

reviews.author: Drea Davis
reviews.body: This restaurant is very high speed and busy, food quality is amazing in the atmosphere is very friendly and lively. The staff is very kind. The food is excellent! I get pho or vermicelli with a Boba tea every time I go. This restaurant is definitely a staple.

reviews.author: Emman Boquiren (e!)
reviews.body: Sunday's Best! We live nearby and for some reason we just found out about this place! Ordered the spring rolls, egg rolls, stuffed jalapeno, Shaken Beef and Vietnamese coffee. I have to say all orders met expectations. What surprised me was …

reviews.author: Jeremy Martin
reviews.body: This is a great Asian Fusion spot! V's House in North Richland Hills is a hidden gem if you are craving Vietnamese …

reviews.author: Orteel4 o
reviews.body: Ive been coming here for over a year. Alone and with anyone that I can bring. I always have great service. Ive had almost every waiter and have been here when it opens, when its about to close, uber eats and pick up. Its always consistent …

reviews.author: A M
reviews.body: I took my Godmother here a couple of weeks ago. It was a first for us both. We had Michelle as our server and she was just fabulous! GM had the Shrimp Pho and I had the Lemongrass Chicken. It was some of the BEST Asian food we ever had! Going again this weekend!😋 …

reviews.author: Nansi Fatahalla
reviews.body: Came in to eat the other day with my husband and wow wow wow that calamari is delightfully! The bahn khot was a little oily for my taste but my husband loved it. Our server Reel was very attentive as well and ga e great service. First time but definitely not the last time coming!

reviews.author: EdwardInTX
reviews.body: 9/2025: pho prices are about $12-14 or $14- $16 now Came here on 11/18 for the 3 year anniversary. Waited in the 1 hour long line …

reviews.author: Laura Vargas
reviews.body: Fantastic place. We had a wonderful Valentine's Day here. The atmosphere is upbeat yet still romantic. The food is really really good and they have healthy options as well as decadent ones. The service is beyond amazing with the employees being engaging with eye contact and follow through. It was very nice!

reviews.author: Samantha Davenport
reviews.body: I've been here twice now and on both occasions have a wonderful experience. Let's start off a very friendly and attentive. The food is very well prepared and tastes delicious.

reviews.author: Anu Tamang Nepali Realtor
reviews.body: It was my first time being here but I really love the food. Really so much fun to hangout with friends. And so cool decorations. I just wanna go back and some drinks with friends and enjoy the outdoor with lights and watching the traffic with music. Highly recommended!

reviews.author: Stephen Flores
reviews.body: Honestly heard about this place from one of the owners when I used to work at a luxury store. They were so sweet and kind. I am so happy that I was able to stop by and try it out. And to be honest this is probably one of my favorite places …

reviews.author: WhoDat
reviews.body: Where do I begin...? I initially called to see if they were a full service restaurant. The moment I walked in, I knew I was in the right place. The host was so welcoming and got me seated immediately. My waitress Melody was amazing. She was …

reviews.author: Baby
reviews.body: After we visited here once, and we visited again the same week for Friday cocktails. They have pho, vermicelli bowls, fried rice, lemongrass chicken.. Our favorites were their pork or beef options because they are juicier. …

reviews.author: Danielle Daniels
reviews.body: I think I just found my new fav pho shot! Our server was friendly, our food came out quickly and it was delicious. They have a $15 lunch special that included an appetizer and they have a rather large drink menu with champagne, wines and cocktails. There is indoor and outdoor seating.

reviews.author: Good Pain Artworks Tattoo & Piercing Shop
reviews.body: We came for the $1 Pho & $1 Boba deal for their 3 Year Anniversary & it was so nice! Our servers were respectful & attentive despite the line out the door & overall chaotic atmosphere. We arrived a little after opening around 10:50am & …

reviews.author: angelica guardado
reviews.body: This place was a 10/10!! Highly recommend eating here. Every single thing we ate was delicious Meal type Dinner Price per person $20–30 Food: 5 Service: 5 Atmosphere: 5 Recommended dishes Beef Pho, Grilled Pork, Beef Noodle Soup, Pork Vermicelli Group size 3-4 people

reviews.author: Alicia Probasco
reviews.body: Amazing spring rolls and ahi tuna tower! Perfect heat and flavors. Thanks, Kathy, for the great service! We will be back!

reviews.author: Whitmore Reads
reviews.body: This restaurant has everything I enjoy in a restaurant, it's clean, classy and comfortable. The hostess is always kind and personal, she makes you feel like you are coming home to have a meal with family and friends. The wait staff always …

reviews.author: MJ Aguirre
reviews.body: … (which is to be expected as this is THE special to die for) but still, pho was amazing, apps were amazing, boba, customer service, everything! My only complaint is about a guest who decided to throw a tantrum about waiting to pay for her …

reviews.author: Stephanie Arizpe
reviews.body: … brief chat with me. Last, the food was delicious! I started off with the Toasted Crab Bread, then the Ginger Peach Bourbon Smash cocktail, the Shaken Beef, and finally the Hazelnut Boba. I recommend it all, but especially their Crab Bread.

reviews.author: Anvita Kotha
reviews.body: … but will definitely be returning! Although there was about a 2 hour wait (understandable because of the $1 pho and boba deal), everyone was still patient, kind and were able to get food out quickly. They didn’t make us feel rushed, …

reviews.author: Jayesh Sharma
reviews.body: … lovely vegetarian options. They have a mix of a few Asian dishes, with good pho, fried rice, sushi, as well as good boba and tea. I enjoyed their tofu vermicelli and my partner had a great time with V's tower (although it was a bit heavy …

reviews.author: Fwtx. Betzayyy
reviews.body: My sister and I went since my coworker always rave abt this place and it met all my high expectations! food was so good and felt like clean food. their oreo boba was to die for !

reviews.author: Eric Serrano
reviews.body: Me and my friend came to checkout their 3 year anniversary $1 pho and boba. We waited almost 3 hours but it was so worth it! Not only did they honor their $1 price despite being close to closing time, they served the food pretty fast …

reviews.author: Brenda Hankins
reviews.body: We love Vs House!! Great patio, great sushi, great cocktails, great service, great entrees, everything great. Manager always comes to talk to you. My favorite dish is the spicy beef noodle soup. It’s so fresh and flavorful. One of our fave …

reviews.author: Ulysses Espinoza
reviews.body: The food is tasty and the space is beautifully decorated with greenery and chic lighting. There’s also a spacious patio, which is also nicely decorated. Very good overall.

reviews.author: Robert Capogreco
reviews.body: … was delicious. No shortcuts here, quality ingredients ample servings. Manager very engaged. the coconut cake was to die for! Large Patio, beautiful weather, cold drinks. 2nd time there, love this place. My new fav. P.S. we ate some of the …

reviews.author: James Neder
reviews.body: … lovely and knew her product! I ordered what she usually eats for lunch and it was delectable. I'll be requesting her service in the future. Had a great time enjoying the views on the patio while everyone else was in traffic on the freeway!
